ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 Pandoc 插件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 Pandoc 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This local CSS file will be read and injected into HTML exports. Use an absolute path or a path relative to the vault.
ast.target: 此本地 CSS 文件将被读取并注入到 HTML 导出中。请使用绝对路径或相对于库的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This applies app & plugin CSS to HTML exports, but the files become a little bigger.
ast.target: 此选项会将应用和插件 CSS 应用于 HTML 导出，但文件会变得稍大一些。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This controls how [[wiki-links]] are formatted. Doesn't affect HTML output.
ast.target: 此选项控制 [[wiki-链接]] 的格式。不影响 HTML 输出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export from markdown, or from the HTML visible in Obsidian? HTML supports fancy plugin features, markdown supports Pandoc features like citations.
ast.target: 从 Markdown 导出，还是从 Obsidian 中可见的 HTML 导出？HTML 支持花哨的插件功能，Markdown 支持 Pandoc 功能（如引用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path to an export folder, like 'C:UsersExampleDocuments' or '/home/user/zettelkasten'. If left blank, files are saved next to where they were exported from.
ast.target: 导出文件夹的绝对路径，例如 'C:UsersExampleDocuments' 或 '/home/user/zettelkasten'。如果留空，文件将保存在导出位置旁边。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Doesn't apply to HTML exports. Using the CLI will have slightly different results due to how this plugin works.
ast.target: 不适用于 HTML 导出。由于此插件的工作方式，使用 CLI 会得到略有不同的结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional override for Pandoc's path if you have command not found issues. On Mac/Linux use the output of 'which pandoc' in a terminal; on Windows use the output of 'Get-Command pandoc' in powershell.
ast.target: 如果遇到命令未找到的问题，可选择性覆盖 Pandoc 的路径。在 Mac/Linux 上，使用终端中 'which pandoc' 的输出；在 Windows 上，使用 PowerShell 中 'Get-Command pandoc' 的输出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional override for pdflatex's path. Same as above but with 'which pdflatex'
ast.target: 选择性覆盖 pdflatex 的路径。同上，但使用 'which pdflatex'

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add extra command line arguments so you can use templates or bibliographies. Newlines are turned into spaces
ast.target: 添加额外的命令行参数，以便使用模板或参考文献。换行符将转换为空格。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Custom CSS file for HTML output
ast.target: 用于 HTML 输出的自定义 CSS 文件

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 注入应用 CSS（仅限 HTML 输出）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Export files from HTML or markdown?
ast.target: 从 HTML 或 Markdown 导出文件？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show Pandoc command line interface commands
ast.target: 显示 Pandoc 命令行界面命令

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 示例：--bibliography "Zotero ExportsMy Library.json" 或 --template letter

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Fail to clean temporary files on exit :
ast.target: 退出时清理临时文件失败：

regex.source: setName("Custom CSS file for HTML output")
regex.target: setName("用于 HTML 输出的自定义 CSS 文件")

regex.source: setDesc("This local CSS file will be read and injected into HTML exports. Use an absolute path or a path relative to the vault.")
regex.target: setDesc("此本地 CSS 文件将被读取并注入到 HTML 导出中。请使用绝对路径或相对于库的路径。")

regex.source: setPlaceholder("File name")
regex.target: setPlaceholder("文件名")

regex.source: setName("Inject app CSS (HTML output only)")
regex.target: setName("注入应用 CSS（仅限 HTML 输出）")

regex.source: setDesc("This applies app & plugin CSS to HTML exports, but the files become a little bigger.")
regex.target: setDesc("这会将应用和插件 CSS 应用于 HTML 导出，但文件会变得稍大。")

regex.source: setName("Internal link processing")
regex.target: setName("内部链接处理")

regex.source: setDesc("This controls how [[wiki-links]] are formatted. Doesn't affect HTML output.")
regex.target: setDesc("这控制 [[wiki-links]] 的格式。不影响 HTML 输出。")

regex.source: setName("Export files from HTML or markdown?")
regex.target: setName("从 HTML 还是 Markdown 导出文件？")

regex.source: setDesc("Export from markdown, or from the HTML visible in Obsidian? HTML supports fancy plugin features, markdown supports Pandoc features like citations.")
regex.target: setDesc("从 Markdown 导出，还是从 Obsidian 中可见的 HTML 导出？HTML 支持花哨的插件功能，Markdown 支持 Pandoc 功能（如引用）。")

regex.source: setName("Export folder")
regex.target: setName("导出文件夹")

regex.source: setDesc("Absolute path to an export folder, like 'C:UsersExampleDocuments' or '/home/user/zettelkasten'. If left blank, files are saved next to where they were exported from.")
regex.target: setDesc("导出文件夹的绝对路径，例如 'C:UsersExampleDocuments' 或 '/home/user/zettelkasten'。如果留空，文件将保存在导出位置旁边。")

regex.source: setPlaceholder("same as target")
regex.target: setPlaceholder("与目标相同")

regex.source: setName("Show Pandoc command line interface commands")
regex.target: setName("显示 Pandoc 命令行界面命令")

regex.source: setDesc("Doesn't apply to HTML exports. Using the CLI will have slightly different results due to how this plugin works.")
regex.target: setDesc("不适用于 HTML 导出。由于此插件的工作方式，使用 CLI 会产生略有不同的结果。")

regex.source: setName("Pandoc path")
regex.target: setName("Pandoc 路径")

regex.source: setDesc("Optional override for Pandoc's path if you have command not found issues. On Mac/Linux use the output of 'which pandoc' in a terminal; on Windows use the output of 'Get-Command pandoc' in powershell.")
regex.target: setDesc("如果遇到命令未找到的问题，可在此处覆盖 Pandoc 的路径。在 Mac/Linux 上，使用终端中 'which pandoc' 的输出；在 Windows 上，使用 PowerShell 中 'Get-Command pandoc' 的输出。")

regex.source: setName("PDFLaTeX path")
regex.target: setName("PDFLaTeX 路径")

regex.source: setDesc("Optional override for pdflatex's path. Same as above but with 'which pdflatex'")
regex.target: setDesc("可选的 pdflatex 路径覆盖。与上述相同，但使用 'which pdflatex'")

regex.source: setName("Extra Pandoc arguments")
regex.target: setName("额外的 Pandoc 参数")

regex.source: setDesc("Add extra command line arguments so you can use templates or bibliographies. Newlines are turned into spaces")
regex.target: setDesc("添加额外的命令行参数，以便您可以使用模板或参考文献。换行符将转换为空格")

regex.source: setPlaceholder('Example: --bibliography "Zotero ExportsMy Library.json" or --template letter')
regex.target: setPlaceholder('示例：--bibliography "Zotero ExportsMy Library.json" 或 --template letter')

regex.source: log("Loading Pandoc plugin")
regex.target: log("正在加载 Pandoc 插件")

regex.source: Notice(`Exporting ${inputFile} to ${shortName}`)
regex.target: Notice(`正在将 ${inputFile} 导出为 ${shortName}`)

regex.source: Notice("Exported via Pandoc to " + outputFile + " with warnings")
regex.target: Notice("已通过 Pandoc 导出到 " + outputFile + "，但存在警告")

regex.source: name = `${prefix}${i}`
regex.target: name = `${prefix}${i}`

regex.source: text: "Pandoc Plugin"
regex.target: text: "Pandoc 插件"

regex.source: name = "Export as "
regex.target: name = "导出为 "
